tagline: Santa Rosa custom homes, additions & remodels since 2005
seoDescription: EMJ Builders is a Santa Rosa general contractor for custom homes, additions, kitchen and bath remodels, and renovations across Sonoma, Marin, and Napa counties. Owner-operated by Ethan Johnson. CA Lic. #862218.
heroHeading: Custom homes, additions, and remodels built right in Sonoma County
heroSubheading: Owner-operated Santa Rosa general contractor with 25+ years of building experience, serving Sonoma, Marin, and Napa counties.
aboutBody: EMJ Builders is an owner-operated general contractor based in Santa Rosa, founded by Ethan Johnson in 2005. Ethan has spent more than 25 years in construction and has run EMJ Builders for nearly two decades, building a reputation across the North Bay for honest work and close attention to detail.

The team handles all phases of construction — from the foundation up to the finishing touches — including new custom homes, additions, kitchen and bath remodels, decks, and renovations large and small. They also take on insurance claim work, rebuilding homes after fire and flood damage. The goal on every project is simple: make sure the customer is completely satisfied when the job is done.

services.title: Additions
services.description: Room additions and expansions that add the space your home needs, tied seamlessly into the existing structure.

services.title: Kitchen & Bath Remodels
services.description: Full kitchen and bathroom remodels with careful attention to detail and finish.

services.title: New Custom Homes
services.description: Ground-up custom home construction, from the foundation up to the final finishes.

services.title: Renovations
services.description: Renovations large and small that update and improve your existing home.

services.title: Decks & Outdoor
services.description: Decks and outdoor living projects built to last in the North Bay climate.

services.title: Damage Restoration
services.description: Fire and flood damage rebuilds and insurance claim work to put your home back together.

team.name: Ethan Johnson
team.bio: Ethan founded EMJ Builders in 2005 and has more than 25 years in the construction field. He prides himself on honesty and attention to detail, and personally stands behind the work on every job.

notes: Live site (emjbuilders.com) is a parked/lander placeholder — no real content or photos available there.
